error_signature: Failed to start Python task runner in internal mode
title: Python task runner missing for internal mode
symptom: When attempting to start n8n with the `--tunnel` option, an error indicates that Python 3 is missing from the system.
applies_when: Trying to start n8n with the `--tunnel` option
not_this_if: Using a version of n8n prior to v2.0
root_cause: In n8n v2.0, the `--tunnel` option was removed, and the internal Python task runner is not available unless Python 3 is installed. This change is part of the breaking changes introduced in the new version.
fix_steps: Remove the `--tunnel` option from your command
Use ngrok with the command `ngrok http 5678` to expose your n8n instance
Follow ngrok setup instructions to establish the tunnel
agent_instruction: Remove the `--tunnel` option and use ngrok to create a tunnel to your n8n instance.
